title: Fix pooled Phase-D per-asset extraction crash when an asset has zero events in a pooled fold (SOLUSD 14/16 gap)
why: Phase-D ERROR SOLUSD/{ema_cross,momentum_zscore}: IndexError index -1 out of bounds for axis 0 with size 0, in _write_per_asset_oos (scripts/run_multi_h4.py:1707 call site). SOL's ~1.4y history (3,149 H4 bars) contributes zero events to early pooled folds; the per-asset OOS extraction indexes an empty array. Left B0148 at 14/16 coverage - the verdict carries a pre-stated revisit clause: if SOL re-measures with DSR>0.95 on either primary, criterion 1 is re-evaluated on 16/16 (criteria stay frozen).
value_rationale: Unblocks full-roster pooled runs for any future transfer experiment; SOL revisit clause on B0148.
scope: TDD repro: pooled fixture where one asset has zero events in >=1 pooled fold
Fix: skip empty per-asset fold blocks gracefully (NaN metrics for that fold, not a crash); summary still written
Re-run pooled extraction for SOLUSD only (pooled models exist; extraction is cheap) and re-run the frozen comparator on 16/16
MUST NOT touch frozen B0148 semantics (best_model rule, familywise N, band/veto numbers)
recommendation: S effort; do before any future pooled-style experiment.
